calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jak Marquez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sylvia Swartz, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Eric Dupree.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sylvia Swartz, and against defendant Eric Dupree as follows:

Plaintiff Sylvia Swartz shall recover from defendant Eric Dupree Holdover Damages in the amount of $7,632.57, and costs in the amount of $195.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $7,827.57.

Additionally, plaintiff Sylvia Swartz is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1181 Oak Street, San Francisco, CA 94117. The rental agreement is conceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Advanced From Jun-24-08 To Jun-13-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
